headline: HSBC upgrades Block, cites ‘material increase in earnings power’
summary: Investing.com -- HSBC has taken a more bullish stance on Block after Q4 2025 results, with analyst Saul Martinez sharply raising earnings estimates and lifting the bank’s target price to $77 from $70, upgrading the shares to Buy.

headline: Block Resets With Massive Job Cuts And AI Focused Overhaul
summary: Block (NYSE:XYZ) has announced a workforce reduction of more than 40% alongside a broad restructuring of its operations. The company plans to weave artificial intelligence into core functions as part of this reset, led by CEO Jack Dorsey. Management is presenting the move as a proactive overhaul of Block’s operating model rather than a response to immediate financial distress. Block enters this reset with a mixed share price record and a current price of $64.45. The stock is up 27.0% over...

headline: Jack Dorsey’s Latest Far-Out Bet: An AI Future With Fewer Employees
